# PERF-032 positive: string <-> []byte conversion inside a hot loop
lang: go
file: PERF-032-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "net/http"

import "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

func Echo(c *gin.Context) {
	out := make([][]byte, 0, 16)
	for _, v := range []string{"a", "b", "c"} {
		_ = v
		out = append(out, []byte(v))
	}
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/plain", []byte("ok"))
}
